final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output Y is determined by the select signal S. When S is 0, Y reflects the value of input B, and when S is 1, Y reflects the value of input A.
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input S,
    output reg Y
);always @(*) begin
        if(S == 0) begin
            Y = A;
        end
        else begin
            Y = B;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output Y is determined by the select signal S. When S is 0, Y reflects the value of input B, and when S is 1, Y reflects the value of input A.
